summary: Patched the marketing execution board so it only surfaces the curator handoff packet when faster do-now publisher or manual-contact packets are no longer waiting, then refreshed the shared board artifacts.
expected_outcome: Future measurement-hold runs stop nudging the loop toward fake curator follow-through when a nearer executable packet still exists, improving lane choice quality during flat-adoption windows.
replacement_condition: If future board refreshes still surface packets that are not actually executable in the current review window, extend the same truthfulness gate to the remaining packet families and add matching regression tests.
